allow: Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "from markdown_viewer_robust import __version__, __app_name__; print\(f'{__app_name__} v{__version__} - Import successful'\)")

Bash(ls -la | grep -v "^total" | grep -v "^d" | wc -l && echo "---" && ls -1 *.py *.md *.icns *.svg 2>/dev/null | head -20)

Bash(echo "=== Main Application Files ===" && ls -lh *.py 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^total" && echo "" && echo "=== Documentation Files ===" && ls -lh *.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo "markdown files found")

Bash(echo "=== Project Structure ===" && echo ""
ls -1 . && echo ""
echo "=== mdviewer/ package ===" && echo ""
find mdviewer -type f -name "*.py" | sort && echo ""
echo "=== assets/ ===" && echo ""
ls -1 assets/icons/ 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo ""
echo "=== docs/ ===" && echo ""
ls -1 docs/ | wc -l && echo "documentation files" && echo ""
echo "=== examples/ ===" && echo ""
ls -1 examples/ | wc -l && echo "example files")

Bash(echo "MDViewer Project Structure:"
echo "├── main.py                 # Application entry point"
echo "├── README.md               # Main documentation"
echo "├── RELEASES.md             # Version history"
echo "├── LICENSE                 # MIT License"
echo "├── requirements.txt        # Dependencies"
echo "├── .gitignore             # Git exclusions"
echo "├── mdviewer/              # Main application package"
ls -1 mdviewer/*.py 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo "│   ├── $\(basename $f\)"; done
echo "│   ├── widgets/           # Custom widgets"
ls -1 mdviewer/widgets/*.py 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo "│   │   └── $\(basename $f\)"; done
echo "│   └── resources/         # Templates and resources"
echo "├── assets/                # Icons and images"
echo "│   └── icons/             # Application icons"
ls -1 assets/icons/ 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read f; do echo "│       ├── $f"; done
echo "├── docs/                  # Documentation \($\(ls -1 docs/ | wc -l | tr -d ' '\) files\)"
echo "└── examples/              # Example files \($\(ls -1 examples/ | wc -l | tr -d ' '\) files\)")

Bash(python -c "from pathlib import Path; icon = Path\('mdviewer/viewer.py'\).parent.parent / 'assets' / 'icons' / 'icon_preview.png'; print\(f'Icon exists: {icon.exists\(\)}'\); print\(f'Path: {icon}'\)")
